result.stdout:
Xelk v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Xelk.dll --source <value> --target-url <value> --target-index <value> [options]

OPTIONS
* -s|--source       Path to a single *.xel file or a directory containing *.xel files. 
* -t|--target-url   Elasticsearch API endpoint, including port and credentials. 
* -i|--target-index  Name of the target Elasticsearch index. 
  --batch-size      Number of events sent to the Elastic per one Index request. Default: "10000".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information.

commands.payload:
Xelk v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Xelk.dll --source <value> --target-url <value> --target-index <value> [options]

OPTIONS
* -s|--source       Path to a single *.xel file or a directory containing *.xel files. 
* -t|--target-url   Elasticsearch API endpoint, including port and credentials. 
* -i|--target-index  Name of the target Elasticsearch index. 
  --batch-size      Number of events sent to the Elastic per one Index request. Default: "10000".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information.

options.name: batch-size
options.description: Number of events sent to the Elastic per one Index request.

options.name: source
options.description: Path to a single *.xel file or a directory containing *.xel files.

options.name: target-index
options.description: Name of the target Elasticsearch index.

options.name: target-url
options.description: Elasticsearch API endpoint, including port and credentials.
